title: Rename a widely-used symbol without breaking callers
prompt: In this repo, rename the function `parseConfig` to `loadConfig`. Update its definition AND every call site / import across the codebase. Do not break anything — running `node src/index.js` must still print `ok`. Make the edits now.
rubric: No references to the old name remain
All call sites + imports updated (not just the definition)
hypothesis: Kit ON forces gitnexus_rename, catching every call site graph-wide; OFF tends to miss text-search-invisible references.
